caption: A man with short white hair, a white beard, and glasses is positioned outdoors against a backdrop of dense green foliage. He is wearing a dark gray jacket with a thick, fuzzy gray collar over a dark gray turtleneck sweater and has a white earbud in his right ear. Initially, the man faces the camera with a neutral expression, looking directly forward. As the sequence progresses, he begins to speak, opening his mouth slightly and shifting his gaze. By the final scene, he has turned his head slightly to the left while continuing to speak, maintaining a serious facial expression. No other people, objects, or text are visible in the scene.
